generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointcloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelD435iDepthDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoPointcloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance IntelD435iDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435i
]

instance RawLiDARPointcloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointcloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringModel
]

instance RawDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth perception data from Intel Deepsense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelD435iDepthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterModel
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ClusteredPointcloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered point cloud data from DBSCAN algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointcloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterModel
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks derived from Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ClusteredPointcloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogicModel
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and steering angle derived from sensor processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointcloudData, IntelD435iDepthDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogicModel
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic per ISO 15622 Performance Class I"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing vehicle state and object tracks as timeseries data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and software libraries"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication and node management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, ComputationOffloadingService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of data processing components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC system execution enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data storage enabler for SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processing raw sensor data into object tracks and vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksInsight, VehicleStateInsight
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization, data saving, and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, DataSaving, Reporting
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC via UI with commands to enable/disable, set desired speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteEnableDisable, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time object tracks for lead vehicle detection"
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and steering angle"
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks and vehicle state"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state and object tracks to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Reporting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC system execution for maintaining safe following distance based on lead vehicle detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for ACC via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity responsible for physical actuation and sensing"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity responsible for data processing and simulation"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for interaction and visualization"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for integration with other systems"
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Collection Functional Entity for processing sensor data into object tracks and vehicle state data"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Actuation Functional Entity for motor and steering control"
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance MotorActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
    base:isContainedIn ActuationFE
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle steering control"
    base:isContainedIn ActuationFE
]

instance VedderESCC : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX processing unit"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano processing unit"
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4System : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle"
    base:contains NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, HokuyoUST10LX, IntelD435i, VedderESCC, PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals for desired speed, emergency braking, and ACC enable/disable commands sent from the Digital Twin Entity's Controlling FE to the motor and steering actuators in the Physical Twin Entity."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for distributed system coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entities communicate via ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, with Data Translation FE handling data serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions across all system components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation), validation of requirements compliance, and operation phase (optimization and health monitoring) throughout the vehicle lifecycle, supporting digital threads for end-to-end information flow."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC system implemented per ISO 15622 Performance Class I; latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization 100 ms for safety-critical operation; specific verification/validation mechanisms beyond these requirements not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for all data streams."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity components (e.g., ACC, Data Storage) deployed on external devices; User Entity on remote devices for visualization and control."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT design and ISO 15622 for ACC implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical operation ensured via strict latency (≤100 ms) and clock synchronization (100 ms) requirements; no specific cybersecurity measures or safety protocols beyond these requirements detailed in the document."
]
